component.name: LaunchTask
component.script:
sub Init() m.top.functionName = "doLaunch" end sub
sub doLaunch() url = m.top.launchUrl if url = "" or url = invalid then return
transfer = CreateObject("roUrlTransfer") transfer.SetUrl(url) port = CreateObject("roMessagePort") transfer.SetMessagePort(port) transfer.AsyncPostFromString("") Wait(3000, port) end sub
